title: Attack on Titan: Helos
description: Adds Attack on Titan, (AoT) also known as, Shingeki no Kyojin, (SnK) into Minecraft
body:
# **Mod Showcase Video**

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/iIURfgF14sQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# **Current Additions**

This mod currently adds **ODM Gear** from Attack on Titan, blades, resupply stations, and titans! All items are craftable within survival, with (currently) simple recipes.

**ODM Gear** - The main mechanic of the mod, using Z/C by default with a blade in both hands will allow you maneuver and zip through the air. It requires Iceburst Gas to function, and will need to be refilled after a bit of usage.

**Ultrahard-Steel Blades** - The main weapon of the mod, you need two to be able to use ODM Gear. They have a limited blade supply when used against titans, and require you to create separate blades to refill them.

**Iceburst Gas Canisters** - The essential fuel for using ODM Gear, it is needed to function at all. (Currently requires Blue Ice to make)

**Resupply Stations** - You can make Gas Tanks and Blade Crates to store larger quantities of supplies. You can easily refill gas or blades just by right clicking the blocks.

**Pure Titans** - Large humanoids that spawn around the world. At night they become dormant, making your travels much safer. To kill them you need Ultrahard-Steel Blades, and you must cut their nape. You can also blind them with the blades to make getting to their nape easier, or to disable them from the fight temporarily.

---
